info: BIT Durg has produced talented engineers and managers placed at top companies across India and abroad.

notable.name: Rahul Sharma
notable.message: BIT Durg gave me the foundation to crack Google. Focus on DSA and never stop building things.

notable.name: Priya Agrawal
notable.message: The competitive environment at BIT Durg pushed me to work harder every day.

notable.name: Ankit Verma
notable.message: Cloud computing is the future. Start early, get certified, and build projects.

notable.name: Deepika Sahu
notable.message: ECE from BIT Durg opened doors I never imagined. The lab exposure was incredible.

notable.name: Suresh Patel
notable.message: Mechanical engineering at BIT gave me real-world problem solving skills.

notable.name: Neha Pandey
notable.message: MCA from BIT helped me transition into software development. Never underestimate a postgraduate degree.

notable.name: Vikram Gupta
notable.message: The case studies and industry exposure during MBA at BIT prepared me for consulting.

notable.name: Aisha Khan
notable.message: Campus placements at BIT are competitive. Use your 4 years wisely.

notable.name: Rohan Mishra
notable.message: Learn DevOps and cloud early. They are the most in-demand skills right now.

notable.name: Kavita Dewangan
notable.message: AI and ML are the future. Start with Python, build projects, and apply early.
